title: AI Hotel Guest Reservation Status Notifier
problem: Front desk teams were manually sending repetitive pre-arrival, check-in, and post-stay messages, leading to delays and inconsistent guest experience.
solution: Built an n8n workflow that triggers on reservation status changes, uses OpenAI to personalize messaging, and delivers it through the guest's preferred channel automatically.
results: Reduced manual messaging time by an estimated 80%
Consistent, on-brand guest communication at every touchpoint

title: Hotel Reservation Automation
problem: Reservation confirmations, modifications, and cancellations required repetitive manual entry across the PMS and follow-up communication tools.
solution: Designed an automated workflow that syncs reservation events with downstream systems and triggers confirmation, reminder, and follow-up sequences without manual intervention.
results: Faster, more reliable confirmation delivery to guests

title: Social Media Automation
problem: Manually drafting, formatting, and scheduling social content across platforms consumed hours each week with inconsistent posting cadence.
solution: Created an automated content pipeline that generates draft copy with generative AI, applies brand guidelines, and schedules posts across platforms on a fixed cadence.
results: Consistent weekly posting schedule with zero missed posts
Significant reduction in content preparation time

title: WhatsApp Hotel Recepcionist Automation
problem: Guest inquiries arriving through WhatsApp required constant manual monitoring and repetitive responses to common questions.
solution: Implemented a WhatsApp Business API automation with an AI-assisted response layer for common questions and clear handoff rules to a human agent for complex requests.
results: Faster first-response time on guest inquiries
Reduced repetitive workload on front office staff

title: Daily Hotel Reports Automation
problem: Compiling daily occupancy, revenue, and operational reports from multiple systems required manual copy-paste work every morning.
solution: Automated the collection, formatting, and distribution of daily reports, pulling data from source systems on a schedule and delivering a formatted summary to stakeholders.
results: Daily reports delivered automatically every morning
Removed manual reporting work across the front office team
